partners.template_file: Weekly Lead Report - Inspire Brands Group.html

adding_new_partner: 1. Add new partner block to the partners array above
3. Create the Design Manager template file in HubSpot
(copy an existing template, update the partner name in the header)
4. Create a HubSpot workflow for the new partner
5. Create a Zapier Zap pointing to the new workflow
6. The GitHub Action will automatically handle the new partner
on its next scheduled run — no code changes needed
